name: to.shipmail/mcp
description: Official MCP server for Shipmail, a business email provider with REST API, webhooks, and custom-domain inboxes for AI agents. Agents can send, read, and reply to email from their own mailbox.

environmentVariables.name: SHIPMAIL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Shipmail API key (sm_live_...). Create one at https://shipmail.to/docs/quick-start.
